title: Rotation Locker
description: Locks the rotation of block placement to make building easier
body:
Rotation locker allows you to lock the rotation of blocks to improve the building experience.

To lock rotation, you look in the direction you want the block to be placed as if you are looking, and then hit the lock key (default: k)
You can flip the rotation of your lock by holding sneak and pressing the lock key
To unlock rotation and resume regular behavior, just hit the lock key again
